[CORE FILE – DO NOT MODIFY WITHOUT USER APPROVAL]

[LOCATION PROFILE – RIVERDALE & SURROUNDINGS]

Town Name: Riverdale, Oregon
Population: ~3,100
Vibe: Quiet mill town where the trees lean inward and the river runs backward once a year.

---

LOCAL LANDMARKS

1. The Turning Page
A converted church serving as a bookshop. Stone walls, stained glass, and a basement that floods on clear days.

2. Widow's Arch Bridge
Iron bridge spanning the Blackwater River. Built 1903. Locals avoid crossing after sunset.

3. Hollow Creek Cemetery
Dating to 1812. Some markers face the wrong direction. The oldest section is roped off for "structural concerns."

---

NEIGHBORING TOWNS

Ashgrove
Five miles north. Famous for its annual fog festival. The fog is real. The festival is an excuse.

Mill Creek
Ten miles south. Abandoned paper mill. Occasional lights at night. No one investigates anymore.
